parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ username: 'marcmayol.com', embeds: [{ title: '📬 ' + $json.name + ($json.company ? ' · ' + $json.company : ''), description: $json.message.slice(0, 1500), color: 14034984, fields: [ { name: 'Email', value: $json.email, inline: true }, { name: 'Motivo', value: $json.topic, inline: true } ], footer: { text: ($json.lang || '?') + ' · ' + ($json.page || '/') }, timestamp: new Date().toISOString() }] }) }}
